pages.text: Fireball: Lianqi Early, fire, costs 10 qi.$(br)Shoots a fireball that deals damage and ignites targets.
$(br)Lingbeng: Lianqi Late, thunder, costs 85 qi.$(br)Enter a breaking-force state. Punch a block or entity to release an explosion. Recasting stacks the radius.
$(br)Lightning Invocation: Lianqi Late, thunder, costs 40 qi.$(br)Shoots a crackling thunder projectile. On hit, lightning falls onto the target for 20 damage.
$(br)Five Thunder Orthodoxy: Foundation Establishment Middle, thunder, costs 120 qi.$(br)An orthodox thunder art that fires a stronger projectile and calls five lightning columns for 100 damage.
$(br)Regeneration: Lianqi Middle, wood, costs 20 qi.$(br)Restores health with a short healing effect.
$(br)Beam: Lianqi Early, light, costs 30 qi.$(br)Making you able to see entities near you.
$(br)Earth Escape: Lianqi Late, earth.$(br)Sink underground, move faster, and spend qi over time until you surface.
$(br)Cleanse: Lianqi Early, water, costs 10 qi.$(br)Clears harmful effects from yourself.

$(br)Sliding Water: Lianqi Early, water, costs 30 qi.$(br)Shoots a water projectile. When it hits a block, it creates a shallow puddle with puddle.fx one block above the hit block. Stepping on the puddle applies Magic Ritual inverted controls.
$(br)Qi Gathering: Lianqi Early, wind, costs no qi.$(br)Greatly improves qi regeneration, but you cannot attack or block. Damage taken while gathering qi is tripled.
$(br)Lingzhi Bullet: Lianqi Early, wind, costs 5 qi.$(br)Condenses a small amount of qi at the fingertip and fires it forward. Deals 5 damage and breaks up to 3 blocks.
$(br)Wind Blade: Lianqi Early, wind, costs 5 qi.$(br)Condenses a small wind blade that cuts and strikes a target for 8 damage.
$(br)Wind Step: Lianqi Early, wind, costs 5 qi per second.$(br)Toggle spell. Wraps wind around your feet, gives Speed II, and allows one double jump before landing.
$(br)Wind Riding Art: Lianqi Late, wind, costs 30 qi per second.$(br)Toggle spell. Grants creative-style low-altitude flight, but flight ends and you fall if no solid block is within 20 blocks below.
$(br)Smoke Art: Lianqi Early, wind, costs 15 qi.$(br)Shoots a smoke projectile that blocks sight by giving the target Blindness for 10 seconds.
$(br)Ignite Flare: Lianqi Early, fire, costs 10 qi.$(br)Shoots a straight flare that ignites the block it hits.
$(br)Spirit Sight: Lianqi Early, light, costs 5 qi per second.$(br)Toggles night vision while the effect is active.
$(br)Zhenshan Palm: Foundation Establishment Middle, earth, tier Earth, costs 390 qi.$(br)Releases a large hand-shaped earth particle wave for 3 seconds. Blocks touched by the palm are destroyed.

$(br)Light Ball: Foundation Establishment Late, light, costs 90 qi to summon and 30 qi per shot.$(br)Summons 6 light balls in a hexagon behind you, stacking up to 3 rings. Punch to release one, or shift-punch to release all. Each shot deals 175 damage and tears through up to 24 blocks.

$(br)Dielang Shield: Lianqi Late, water, tier Earth.$(br)Stacks up to 3 times. Stack 1 costs 50 qi and blocks 12 damage. Stack 2 costs 100 qi and blocks 36 damage. Stack 3 costs 150 qi and blocks 108 damage. Leftover shield strength remains after partial hits.
$(br)Weiya: innate for non-mortals, dark, toggle spell.$(br)Costs 1% max qi each second and suppresses weaker mobs nearby with slowness, weakness, and spell lock at large level gaps.
$(br)Absorb: granted by Reincarnation True Art, dark, costs 80 qi.$(br)Shoots a projectile that steals cultivation progress from a lower-level player and sends stolen progress back to the caster.

$(br)Devour Heaven: granted by Heaven Devouring Demon Art, dark.$(br)Consumes blocks in a 5-block radius without drops for 10 progress each. Deals 100 damage to nearby entities and gains 20 progress per 50 max health from kills.
$(br)Binding Spell: Foundation Establishment Late, metal, costs 200 qi.$(br)Shoots a binding projectile. Lower-level targets are immobilized for 3, 5, or 10 seconds depending on the level gap.
